---
title: "dialogue.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/dialogue.py"
loc: 59
complexity: 12
logic_score: 2.20
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.23
---

## Intent
Core semantic routing engine for intent resolution.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate SovereignEngine and invoke run(query) to process natural language directives.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 30 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [random](file://random)
- [collections](file://collections)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [yaml](file://yaml)

### Exports
- `DialogueEngine`
- `__init__`
- `_load`
- `_score_candidate`
- `_select_final_phrase`
- `get`
- `__repr__`
